title.en: The green egg's shell began to crack, and a paw...

content.en:
This green egg is full of curse poison, but it is also full of the breath of life.

Click!!

The green egg's shell began to crack, and a paw sticked out.

Then, a vicious creature crawled out.

In the blink of an eye, the vicious creature swallowed all the shells of the green egg, and its size doubled.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian showed a look of doubt.

This vicious creature resembles the form of a cat, but is distinctly different from the previous monster.

The previous monster was obviously forcibly created by various means, not like a normal life, a bit like a puppet, and had no intelligence at all.

But the eyes of the vicious creature in front of him shone with wisdom, and it was not green.

Only a small area of the creature at the center of the brow is green, and the rest of the creature is golden.

For the first time, Ye Tian used his copying talent to check it.

"How could it be ......?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The talent of the vicious creature appeared in front of him, and its talent was beyond Ye Tian's expectations.

Talent Identification
Species: Cursed Poison Beast
Bloodline Talent: Mixed Level
Strength Talent: God
Defense Talent: God-level
Speed Talent: God-level
Claw Talent: No superior
Poison Curse Talent: God-level
Phantom Talent: God-level

......

"It turned out to be a mixed-level bloodline talent!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This means that if this curse poison beast can continue to grow, it can at least become a Tianzun-level powerhouse in the end, and with the talent of the other party, as well as the assessment of the last poisoner of the death-level difficulty, its combat effectiveness should be above the invincible Henggu-level His Highness, and perhaps reach the combat power of the Supreme-level Highness.

In this way, the other party can even become the supreme in the future!

To put it simply, this is equivalent to a juvenile venerable poisonous beast!

"It's a real life, the instrument spirit of the Yuan Gu Hall actually made a life with such potential, it's terrifying!" Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

If such a curse beast can be mass-produced and cultivated, wouldn't it be possible to cultivate a bunch of supremes?

"The foundation of the Yuangu Hall is too powerful, no wonder even the Supremes can't know the mysteries of the Yuangu Palace, they only know that the Yuangu Hall came from a few cosmic epochs ago!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After using the copying talent to check the talent of this curse poison beast, Ye Tian copied the god-level poison curse talent of the curse poison beast by the way.

Maybe this poisonous spell talent can be immune to some of the power of the curse poison, in that case, it will be useful to Ye Tian.

Shout!!!

The curse beast transformed into nine figures and rushed towards Ye Tian, this should be the effect of the phantom talent.

Ye Tian also has a similar shadow clone talent, but in a real battle, the effect of such a talent is average.

Ye Tian used the insight talent and the Void Eye to easily see through the phantom talent of the cursed poison beast, and slashed directly at the body of the cursed poison beast with a single sword.

Boom!!

The body of the cursed poison beast was directly split out, but to Ye Tian's surprise, the body of the cursed poison beast was not severely damaged, but only a shallow wound was cut.

At this moment, Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Although he didn't use all his strength just now, he also used a combat power stronger than that of an ordinary Supreme-level Highness, and directly hit the body of the curse poison beast, and the curse poison beast did not have an artifact body, so it stands to reason that it should be injured not lightly.

But now, this cursed poisonous beast is not even slightly injured.

"In terms of physical strength, the physical strength of this cursed poisonous beast is far beyond the god level, and even comparable to my physical strength!" Ye Tian said in surprise.

He took the path of rebellion, broke the restrictions of the universe, and obtained the eighteen golden body skills, so that he could continuously improve the strength and strength of his physical body after the god level.

And this cursed poison beast has just been born, and it has such a terrifying physical strength, which is really incredible!

After a few brief fights, Ye Tian truly understood the strength of this curse poison beast, which was equivalent to the combat power of His Highness the God-level Supreme Level, but it was only the combat power of the first-time Supreme Highness level, and it was too far from the combat power of the top Supreme Highness like Ye Tian.

Boom Boom Boom !!

Ye Tian began to attack with all his might, and did not give the cursed poison beast a chance, no matter how the cursed beast attacked, it could not break Ye Tian's defense, allowing the power of the curse poison to invade Ye Tian's body.

Rumble!!!

The Five Elements Divine Wheel suppressed down, and the power of space suppressed the Cursed Poison Beast.

In an instant, Ye Tian's Heavenly Moon Knife slashed down, almost completely shattering the curse poison beast.

At the moment when the Cursed Poison Beast was about to die, the Cursed Poison Beast disappeared and was teleported away.

Obviously, the Yuan Gu Hall didn't want the Cursed Poison Beast to die like this, so it moved the Cursed Poison Beast.

"Congratulations, you've passed the death-level difficulty assessment!"

"Do you understand how to get rewards, or continue to assess the difficulty of the heaven-defying level!"

The voice of the machine spirit came.

"Can you wait, I want to think about it!"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes, but only for half a day!"

The voice of the machine spirit was heard again.

"Half a day, that's enough!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he began to fuse the god-level poison curse talent.

In Ye Tian's opinion, the death-level difficulty is so terrifying, and the anti-heaven-level difficulty is estimated to be even more terrifying, maybe the anti-heaven-level difficulty also has a curse Gu poison.

Once the creature he encounters is not weaker than him, he can't completely stop the power of the curse Gu poison from invading his body, if he can't remove the power of the curse poison, his strength will become weaker and weaker, and he will eventually lose.

Therefore, he must fuse the god-level poison curse talent.

Of course, this was just his guess, but he had to prepare for the Heaven-Defying Difficulty, otherwise once he entered the Heaven-Defying Difficulty assessment, he might not have time to fuse the God-level Poison Curse Talent.

Rumble!

The fusion begins!

Half an hour later, Ye Tian successfully fused the god-level poison spell talent, and checked the specific effect of the god-level poison spell talent.

"Sure enough, as expected, the Poison Curse talent is immune to a portion of the power of the Spell Gu, but it is not completely immune to the enemy's Spell Poison. This is the same as the fire talent, you can be immune to a part of the fire power attack, but it is impossible to ignore the enemy's fire power attack. Moreover, the Poison Curse talent can control a part of the Poison Curse power, including the Curse Gu Poison Power!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He opened his palm, and a wisp of green material appeared in his palm.

Immediately, he took out an elixir and poured the power of the curse Gu poison into the elixir.

In the blink of an eye, the elixir turned green, and it was completely invaded by the power of the curse Gu poison.

"It's a good effect, and the spell poison power I cast won't hurt myself, it will only hurt the enemy!" Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian was familiar with the poison spell talent and how to use the poison spell talent.

It's been almost half a day, and it's almost time.

At this time, the voice of the machine spirit came again: "Assessor, how have you thought about it, should you choose a reward, or continue the assessment?"

Ye Tian raised his head, looked at the void, and said, "I choose to continue the assessment!"

"Good!"

Instrument Spirit Dao.

Wow!

A teleportation force surged, and Ye Tian was teleported out of here without any resistance, and then came to another strange place.

When he first came to this unfamiliar area, Ye Tian's face suddenly changed slightly.
